text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, the first race of the Classic Triple Crown,
the Satsuki Sho, is here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan expresses her gratitude to me for
helping her make it this far, and then heads out
to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, in this race she's always dreamed of, her
battle against the skilled Ines Fujin begins!
